content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!

options.text: You're welcome! Have a great day!
That's okay, I didn't do much.
I'm busy now, see you later.
Do you need any more help?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! Have a great day!' 是对感谢最自然、礼貌的回应，符合英语日常交际习惯。选项2过于谦卑且语气消极，选项3与感谢语境无关，选项4是继续提供帮助，而非回应感谢。

content.speakerText: I'll be back next week for my kid's birthday!
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周还会来，给我孩子买生日礼物！

options.text: Awesome! We'll have new stuff in then!
I hope your kid doesn't break anything.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Awesome! We'll have new stuff in then!' 积极回应了对方的未来计划，增强互动与亲和力。选项2带有质疑语气，不符合礼貌场景；选项3和4都是不恰当的、可能冒犯顾客的建议。

content.speakerText: It was nice meeting you. I'll see you soon!
content.speakerTextCn: 很高兴认识你，我们很快再见！

options.text: Do you have a loyalty card?
I'm tired, let's end this conversation.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same here! Take care!' 是对友好道别自然、温暖的回应。选项2虽然正确但过于简短，缺乏礼貌温度；选项3和4完全偏离道别语境，是干扰性错误。

content.hint: 这是对感谢的标准回应，常用于结束对话时表达祝福
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Have a great day（祝福用语）

content.template: Cool! ___ your kid we said hi!
content.hint: 表示'替某人传达问候'的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：Tell someone (that) we said hi（礼貌互动表达）

content.hint: 非正式但自然的道别方式，常用于约定再次见面
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：See you + 时间（日常道别句型）

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
No problem! Enjoy the toy with your little one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'welcome', 'enjoy', 'come back'

content.speakerText: I'll be back next week for my kid's birthday!
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周还会来，给我孩子买生日礼物！
expectedAnswers: That's awesome! We'll have some new birthday toys ready!
Great! Tell your little one we're saving a special gift for them!
Looking forward to seeing you again! Happy birthday to your child!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应未来计划并表达期待
语言准确性：时态、动词和搭配是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了亲切、口语化的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'birthday', 'back', 'new stuff', 'kid' 等场景词

content.speakerText: I'm all set! Have a wonderful day!
content.speakerTextCn: 我准备好了！祝你今天愉快！
expectedAnswers: You too! Thanks for shopping with us!
Thank you! We hope to see you again soon!
Have a great one! And say hi to your little one for me!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应道别并传递友好信息
语言准确性：句型结构和用词是否得体
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者在零售场景中的自然语调
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'have a great day', 'see you again', 'thank you' 等道别高频词
